description:
Engage and complete a launch-appropriate penetration/security test.

**Scope**
- Scope public marketing, auth, onboarding, dashboard, API/webhook routes, Cognito integration, DynamoDB access patterns, and Stripe/MDI webhook verification.
- Include PHI/logging review for no-answer-retention and no-PHI-to-Stripe rules.
- Triage findings into launch blockers versus post-launch hardening.

**Acceptance**
- Test scope and report are archived for launch evidence.
- Critical/high findings are fixed or have approved mitigation before launch.
- Retest confirms fixes for launch-blocking findings.
title: Penetration test engagement
